overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tribal settlement. She exits a stone archway onto a wooden dock over calm water, passes NPCs fishing, explores the end of the pier with views of distant mesas, then returns and ascends stairs through another archway into a grassy palm tree area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor leading to waterfront dock

events.description: exiting stone archway from interior corridor onto outdoor wooden dock over water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: ancient carved stone walls with moss and weathered textures forming a narrow passage
warm glowing lanterns suspended from the corridor ceiling
weathered wooden planks extending over calm misty water visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a narrow stone corridor with carved walls and hanging lanterns. The character walks forward toward a bright archway exit, transitioning from the sheltered interior to an outdoor wooden dock extending over calm water with distant mesas visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden pier over lake with tribal settlement views

events.description: passing a fishing NPC standing on the right side of the dock

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock over calm water toward the distant end of the pier

notable_agents.action: tribal villager fishing with a rod over the side of the dock, facing the water

entered.detail: thick wooden posts wrapped with heavy rope supporting the dock structure
coiled nautical rope piled on the dock planks
red rock formations and mesas rising from misty water in the distance
still reflective water surrounding the dock with mist hovering above

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open wooden dock over calm misty water, passing thick rope-wrapped pier posts and coiled ropes. A tribal NPC stands fishing on the right side. The scene is fully exposed to bright morning sunlight with expansive views of distant red mesa cliffs across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier with view of tribal settlement buildings

events.description: character reaches end of dock and turns around to view the settlement
view shifts from open water to focus on tribal stone buildings and stairs

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the pier, turning around to survey the tribal settlement architecture, then walking back toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: villager standing at the end of the dock looking out at the water

entered.detail: multi-level wooden and stone structure with carved details and hanging fabrics
stone steps leading up from the dock to an archway entrance
small wooden hut with blue fabric banners near the water

segments.scene_description: At the end of the pier, the character turns to reveal a detailed view of the tribal settlement with multi-level stone buildings, wooden shacks, and stone stairs leading upward. The character then walks back along the dock, passing the fishing NPC again, with the pier posts now receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading through archway to palm grove

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs away from the dock
passing through stone archway into open grassy area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs from the dock level, passing through a stone archway into a sunlit palm tree grove

entered.detail: weathered stone steps with mossy edges leading upward from the waterfront
tall palm trees visible through the archway ahead
sunlit grassy area beyond the archway

segments.scene_description: The character ascends stone stairs away from the dock, passing through an ancient stone archway. The scene transitions from the wooden waterfront to a sunlit grassy area with palm trees and wooden shacks, leaving the misty water and pier behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered stone interior out onto a sunlit waterfront before ascending into a lush tribal settlement. It begins within a narrow stone corridor adorned with carved walls and lanterns, moving forward through a bright archway that opens onto a wooden dock extending over calm, misty water. As the camera progresses along the pier, passing rope-wrapped posts and a fishing NPC, the environment expands into a bright morning landscape featuring distant red mesa cliffs. The scene then turns at the end of the pier to reveal the multi-level architecture of the settlement before retracing its steps back along the dock. Finally, the camera ascends stone stairs and passes through another ancient archway, transitioning from the waterfront to a sunlit grassy area filled with palm trees and wooden shacks.
